redisHealthy = pong === 'PONG';\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    redisHealthy = false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const isHealthy = dbHealthy &amp;&amp; redisHealthy;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    status: isHealthy ? 'healthy' : 'unhealthy',\\\\\\\\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\\\\\\\\n    version: '1.0.0',\\\\\\\\n    services: {\\\\\\\\n      database: dbHealthy,\\\\\\\\n      redis:  version: '1.0.0',\\\\\\\\n    status: 'running',\\\\\\\\n    docs: '/docs',\\\\\\\\n    health: '/health'\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  fastify.log.info(&#96;Received ${signal}, shutting down gracefully...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close HTTP server\\\\\\\\n    await fastify.close();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('HTTP server closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close queues\\\\\\\\n    await closeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('BullMQ queues closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close Redis\\\\\\\\n    await closeRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Redis connection closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close database pool\\\\\\\\n    await closePool();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Database pool closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.error({ err: error }, 'Error during shutdown');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(1);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGTERM'));\\\\\\\\nprocess.on('SIGINT', () =&gt; shutdown('SIGINT'));\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst start = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize database connection\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to database...');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n      if (!dbHealthy) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new Error('Database health check returned false');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (dbError) {\\\\\\\\n      const err = dbError as Error;\\\\\\\\n      fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message }, 'Database =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/config/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// Zod-validated configuration with defaults\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { z } from 'zod';\\\\\\\\nimport dotenv from 'dotenv';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Load environment variables\\\\\\\\ndotenv.config();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Schema Definition\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst configSchema = z.object({\\\\\\\\n  // Server\\\\\\\\n  port: z.coerce.number().default(3000),\\\\\\\\n  host: z.string().default('0.0.0.0'),\\\\\\\\n  nodeEnv: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),\\\\\\\\n  logLevel: z.enum(['trace', 'debug', 'info', 'warn', 'error', 'fatal']).default('info'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Database (postgres:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\\\\\\\\n  databaseUrl: z.string().startsWith('postgres'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Redis (redis:// URLs don't pass standard URL validation)\\\\\\\\n  redisUrl: z.string().startsWith('redis'),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Security\\\\\\\\n  jwtSecret: z.string().min(32),\\\\\\\\n  webhookSecret: z.string().min(16),\\\\\\\\n  corsOrigin: z.string().optional(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Encryption (AES-256-GCM for passwords, tokens, etc.)\\\\\\\\n  encryptionKey: z.string().regex(/^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$/, 'Must be 64 hex characters (32 bytes)').optional(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // API Keys (parsed from comma-separated string)\\\\\\\\n  apiKeys: z.array(z.object({\\\\\\\\n    key: z.string(),\\\\\\\\n    source: z.string()\\\\\\\\n  })).default([]),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Moco Integration\\\\\\\\n  moco: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Slack Integration\\\\\\\\n  slack: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    webhookUrl: z.string().url().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    botToken: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Cituro Integration\\\\\\\\n  cituro: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    apiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    subdomain: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // LinkedIn Integration\\\\\\\\n  linkedin: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    clientId: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    clientSecret: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    redirectUri: z.string().default('http://localhost:3000/api/v1/linkedin/callback'),\\\\\\\\n    // SNAP (Sales Navigator API) partner credentials\\\\\\\\n    snapPartnerId: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    // Third-party gateway (e.g. Unipile)\\\\\\\\n    gatewayUrl: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    gatewayApiKey: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // SMTP Configuration\\\\\\\\n  smtp: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    host: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    port: z.coerce.number().default(587),\\\\\\\\n    user: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    pass: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    secure: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    from: z.string().nullish(),\\\\\\\\n    fromName: z.string().default('DNA ME'),\\\\\\\\n    enabled: z.boolean().default(false)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Feature Flags\\\\\\\\n  features: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    mocoSync: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    slackAlerts: z.boolean().default(false),\\\\\\\\n    scoreDecay: z.boolean().default(true)\\\\\\\\n  }),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Rate Limiting\\\\\\\\n  rateLimit: z.object({\\\\\\\\n    max: z.coerce.number().default(100),\\\\\\\\n    timeWindow: z.coerce.number().default(60000)\\\\\\\\n  })\\\\\\\\n});\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport type Config = z.infer&lt;typeof configSchema&gt;;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Parse API Keys\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseApiKeys(envValue: string | undefined): Array&lt;{ key: string; source: string }&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (!envValue) return [];\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\n  return envValue.split(',').map(pair =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    const [key, source] = pair.split(':');\\\\\\\\n    return { key: key.trim(), source: source?.trim() || 'unknown' };\\\\\\\\n  }).filter(item =&gt; item.key);\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Parse Boolean\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, defaultValue: boolean): boolean {\\\\\\\\n  if (value === undefined) return defaultValue;\\\\\\\\n  return value.toLowerCase() === 'true';\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Load and Validate Configuration\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction loadConfig(): Config {\\\\\\\\n  const rawConfig = {\\\\\\\\n    port: process.env.PORT,\\\\\\\\n    host: process.env.HOST,\\\\\\\\n    nodeEnv: process.env.NODE_ENV,\\\\\\\\n    logLevel: process.env.LOG_LEVEL,\\\\\\\\n    databaseUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL,\\\\\\\\n    redisUrl: process.env.REDIS_URL,\\\\\\\\n    jwtSecret: process.env.JWT_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    webhookSecret: process.env.WEBHOOK_SECRET,\\\\\\\\n    corsOrigin: process.env.CORS_ORIGIN || undefined,\\\\\\\\n    encryptionKey: process.env.ENCRYPTION_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n    apiKeys: parseApiKeys(process.env.API_KEYS),\\\\\\\\n    moco: {\\\\\\\\n      apiKey: process.env.MOCO_API_KEY || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      subdomain: process.env.MOCO_SUBDOMAIN || process.env.MOCO_ACCOUNT_ID || undefined,\\\\\\\\n      enabled: \\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- DNA Marketing Engine - Chat System Migration\\\\\\\\n-- Adds conversations, messages, email_accounts, linkedin_connections tables\\\\\\\\n-- with GIN indexes for JSONB fields, sender_id, email_thread_id, status tracking\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Up Migration\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- CONVERSATIONS\\\\\\\\n-- Zentrale Tabelle für Chat-Konversationen (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE conversations (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    lead_id             UUID REFERENCES leads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    deal_id             UUID REFERENCES deals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    type                VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    participant_emails  JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    last_message_at     TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_by_id       UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- Mindestens lead_id ODER deal_id muss gesetzt sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_entity CHECK (lead_id IS NOT NULL OR deal_id IS NOT NULL),\\\\\\\\n    -- type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_type CHECK (type IN ('direct', 'group', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_conversations_status CHECK (status IN ('active', 'archived', 'closed'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- MESSAGES\\\\\\\\n-- Speichert alle Nachrichten (E-Mail, LinkedIn, interne Notizen, Aufgaben)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE messages (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    conversation_id     UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    sender_id           UUID REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\\\\\\\\n    message_type        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'email',\\\\\\\\n    direction           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'outbound',\\\\\\\\n    status              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',\\\\\\\\n    sender_email        VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sender_name         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    recipients          JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    subject             VARCHAR(500),\\\\\\\\n    body_html           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    body_text           TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    metadata            JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    attachments         JSONB DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\n    external_id         VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    email_thread_id     VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    sent_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    read_at             TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    replied_at          TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    error_message       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- message_type muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_type CHECK (message_type IN ('email', 'linkedin', 'internal_note', 'task')),\\\\\\\\n    -- direction muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_direction CHECK (direction IN ('inbound', 'outbound', 'internal')),\\\\\\\\n    -- status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_messages_status CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'sending', 'sent', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- EMAIL ACCOUNTS\\\\\\\\n-- IMAP/SMTP-Konfiguration für E-Mail-Import und -Versand\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE email_accounts (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    email_address       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\n    imap_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    imap_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    imap_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_host           VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_port           INTEGER,\\\\\\\\n    smtp_username       VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    smtp_password       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    sync_enabled        BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    sync_status         VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'idle',\\\\\\\\n    sync_error          TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    -- sync_status muss einer der erlaubten Werte sein\\\\\\\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_email_accounts_sync_status CHECK (sync_status IN ('idle', 'syncing', 'error'))\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- LINKEDIN CONNECTIONS\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn OAuth-Token und Verbindungsstatus\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE linkedin_connections (\\\\\\\\n    id                  UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),\\\\\\\\n    team_member_id      UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES team_members(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\n    linkedin_profile_id VARCHAR(255),\\\\\\\\n    access_token        TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    refresh_token       TEXT,\\\\\\\\n    token_expires_at    TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    profile_data        JSONB DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\n    is_active           BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,\\\\\\\\n    last_sync_at        TIMESTAMPTZ,\\\\\\\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\\\\\\\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- B-TREE INDEXES\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Conversations indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_lead ON conversations(lead_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_deal ON conversations(deal_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_last_message ON conversations(last_message_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_status ON conversations(status);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_created_by ON conversations(created_by_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Messages indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_conversation_sent ON messages(conversation_id, sent_at DESC);\\\\\\\\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_messages_external_id ON messages(external_id) WHERE external_id IS NOT NULL;\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_email_thread ON messages(email_thread_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_type ON messages(message_type);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_sender ON messages(sender_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_status ON messages(status) WHERE status IN ('sending', 'error');\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_direction ON messages(direction);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- Email accounts indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_team_member ON email_accounts(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_email_accounts_sync ON email_accounts(sync_enabled, sync_status);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- LinkedIn connections indexes\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_team_member ON linkedin_connections(team_member_id);\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile ON linkedin_connections(linkedin_profile_id);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- GIN INDEXES für JSONB-Felder\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf participant_emails (für Teilnehmersuche in Conversations)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_conversations_participants ON conversations USING GIN (participant_emails);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf recipients (für Empfängersuche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_recipients ON messages USING GIN (recipients);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf metadata (für Platform-Daten-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_metadata ON messages USING GIN (metadata);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf attachments (für Anhänge-Suche in Messages)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_messages_attachments ON messages USING GIN (attachments);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- GIN-Index auf profile_data (für LinkedIn-Profilsuche)\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX idx_linkedin_connections_profile_data ON linkedin_connections USING GIN (profile_data);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- TRIGGERS (updated_at) - nutzt die bestehende update_updated_at() Funktion\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_conversations_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON conversations\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_messages_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON messages\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_email_accounts_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON email_accounts\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCREATE TRIGGER trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at\\\\\\\\n    BEFORE UPDATE ON linkedin_connections\\\\\\\\n    FOR EACH ROW\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n-- Down Migration (auskommentiert, manuell ausführen bei Bedarf)\\\\\\\\n-- =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_linkedin_connections_updated_at ON linkedin_connections;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_email_accounts_updated_at ON email_accounts;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_messages_updated_at ON messages;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_conversations_updated_at ON conversations;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS linkedin_connections CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS email_accounts CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS messages CASCADE;\\\\\\\\n-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS conversations tate\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_60c5b552-47b3-4352-987a-f0c54f60c2b\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_60c5b552-47b3-4352-987a-f0c54f60c2b\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\workers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\workers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\dname\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\crm_dna-me\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\workers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\index.ts\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// src/workers/index.ts\\\\\\\\n// BullMQ Workers Entry Point\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport { Worker } from 'bullmq';\\\\\\\\nimport { config } from '../config/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getRedisConnection, closeRedisConnection } from '../config/redis.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { closePool } from '../db/index.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createEventWorker } from './eventWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createRoutingWorker } from './routingWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createSyncWorker } from './syncWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createDecayWorker, setupDecayJob } from './decayWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createDailyDigestWorker, setupDailyDigestJob } from './dailyDigestWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { createEmailSequenceWorker, setupEmailSequenceJob } from './emailSequenceWorker.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getEmailService } from '../services/emailService.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getScoringEngine } from '../services/scoringEngine.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getIntentDetector } from '../services/intentDetector.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getPipelineRouter } from '../services/pipelineRouter.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getMocoService } from '../integrations/moco.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getSlackService } from '../integrations/slack.js';\\\\\\\\nimport { getAutomationEngine } from '../services/automationEngine.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconsole.log(&#96;\\\\\\\\n╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗\\\\\\\\n║                                                           ║\\\\\\\\n║   🧬 DNA Marketing Engine - Workers                       ║\\\\\\\\n║                                                           ║\\\\\\\\n║   Environment: ${config.nodeEnv.padEnd(11)}                           ║\\\\\\\\n║                                                           ║\\\\\\\\n╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝\\\\\\\\n&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Worker Registry\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst workers: Worker[] = [];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Initialize Workers\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nasync function initializeWorkers() {\\\\\\\\n  console.log('Initializing workers...');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Redis connection\\\\\\\\n  getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Redis connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Scoring Engine and load rules\\\\\\\\n  const scoringEngine = getScoringEngine();\\\\\\\\n  await scoringEngine.loadRules();\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Scoring Engine initialized');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Intent Detector\\\\\\\\n  const intentDetector = getIntentDetector();\\\\\\\\n  await intentDetector.initialize();\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Intent Detector initialized');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Automation Engine\\\\\\\\n  const automationEngine = getAutomationEngine();\\\\\\\\n  await automationEngine.loadRules();\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;✅ Automation Engine initialized (${automationEngine.getRulesCount()} rules loaded)&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Event Worker - processes incoming marketing events\\\\\\\\n  const eventWorker = createEventWorker(scoringEngine, intentDetector, automationEngine);\\\\\\\\n  workers.push(eventWorker);\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Event Worker started (concurrency: 10, with Scoring + Intent + Automation)');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Pipeline Router\\\\\\\\n  const pipelineRouter = getPipelineRouter();\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Pipeline Router initialized');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Routing Worker - evaluates and routes leads to pipelines\\\\\\\\n  const routingWorker = createRoutingWorker(pipelineRouter);\\\\\\\\n  workers.push(routingWorker);\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Routing Worker started (concurrency: 5)');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Moco Service\\\\\\\\n  const mocoService = getMocoService();\\\\\\\\n  if (mocoService.isConfigured()) {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Moco Service initialized');\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚠️ Moco Service not configured (missing API key or subdomain)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Initialize Slack Service\\\\\\\\n  const slackService = getSlackService();\\\\\\\\n  if (slackService.isConfigured()) {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Slack Service initialized');\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚠️ Slack Service not configured (missing webhook URL)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Sync Worker - handles Moco and Slack synchronization\\\\\\\\n  const syncWorker = createSyncWorker(mocoService, slackService);\\\\\\\\n  workers.push(syncWorker);\\\\\\\\n  console.log('✅ Sync Worker started (concurrency: 3, rate limit: 10/sec)');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Decay Worker - handles daily score decay\\\\\\\\n  if (config.features.scoreDecay) {\\\\\\\\n    const decayWorker = createDecayWorker();\\\\\\\\n    workers.push(decayWorker);\\\\\\\\n    await setupDecayJob();\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Decay Worker started (scheduled: 2:00 AM daily)');\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚠️ Decay Worker disabled (ENABLE_SCORE_DECAY=false)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Daily Digest Worker - sends daily marketing stats to Slack\\\\\\\\n  if (config.features.slackAlerts &amp;&amp; slackService.isConfigured()) {\\\\\\\\n    const dailyDigestWorker = createDailyDigestWorker();\\\\\\\\n    workers.push(dailyDigestWorker);\\\\\\\\n    await setupDailyDigestJob();\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Daily Digest Worker started (scheduled: 8:00 AM daily)');\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚠️ Daily Digest Worker disabled (Slack not configured or ENABLE_SLACK_ALERTS=false)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  // Email Sequence Worker - processes email sequences\\\\\\\\n  const emailService = getEmailService();\\\\\\\\n  if (emailService.checkConfiguration()) {\\\\\\\\n    const emailSequenceWorker = createEmailSequenceWorker();\\\\\\\\n    workers.push(emailSequenceWorker);\\\\\\\\n    await setupEmailSequenceJob();\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Email Sequence Worker started (scheduled: every 15 minutes)');\\\\\\\\n  } else {\\\\\\\\n    console.log('⚠️ Email Sequence Worker disabled (SMTP not configured)');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;✅ ${workers.length} worker(s) initialized&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  console.log('Workers are ready and waiting for jobs...');\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Graceful Shutdown\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  console.log(&#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down workers...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    // Close all workers\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;Closing ${workers.length} worker(s)...&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    await Promise.all(workers.map(worker =&gt; worker.close()));\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ All workers closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close Redis connection\\\\\\\\n    await closeRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Redis connection closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Close database pool\\\\\\\\n    await closePool();\\\\\\\\n    console.log('✅ Database pool closed');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Workers shut down gracefully');\\\\\\\\n    process.exit(0);\\\\\\\\n  } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n    console.error('Error during shutdown:', }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Queue Instances\\\\\\\\n// './index.js';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Connection Options\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfunction parseRedisUrl(url: string): { host: string; port: number; password?: string } {\\\\\\\\n  // Parse redis://[password@]host[:port]\\\\\\\\n  const match = url.match(/^redis:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\/(?:([^@]+)@)?([^:]+)(?::(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+))?$/);\\\\\\\\n  if (!match) {\\\\\\\\n    throw new Error(&#96;Invalid Redis URL: ${url}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n  return {\\\\\\\\n    host: match[2],\\\\\\\\n    port: match[3] ? parseInt(match[3]) : 6379,\\\\\\\\n    password: match[1] || undefined\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst redisConfig = parseRedisUrl(config.redisUrl);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport const redisOptions: RedisOptions = {\\\\\\\\n  host: redisConfig.host,\\\\\\\\n  port: redisConfig.port,\\\\\\\\n  password: redisConfig.password,\\\\\\\\n  maxRetriesPerRequest: null, // Required by BullMQ\\\\\\\\n  enableReadyCheck: false,\\\\\\\\n  retryStrategy: (times: number) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (times &gt; 10) {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('Redis: Max reconnection attempts reached');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    const delay = Math.min(times * 100, 3000);\\\\\\\\n    console.log(&#96;Redis: Reconnecting in ${delay}ms (attempt ${times})&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    return delay;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Create Redis Connection\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nlet redisConnection: Redis | null = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport function getRedisConnection(): Redis {\\\\\\\\n  if (!redisConnection) {\\\\\\\\n    redisConnection = new Redis(redisOptions);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    redisConnection.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('✅ Redis connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    redisConnection.on('error', (err: Error) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('❌ Redis error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    redisConnection.on('close', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('Redis connection closed');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return redisConnection;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Test Connection\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function testRedisConnection(): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  try {\\\\\\\\n    const redis = getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    const pong = await redis.ping();\\\\\\\\n    return pong === 'PONG';\\\\\\\\n  } catch {\\\\\\\\n    return false;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n// Close Connection\\\\\\\\n// =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport async function closeRedisConnection(): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n  if (redisConnection) {\\\\\\\\n    await redisConnection.quit();\\\\\\\\n    redisConnection = null;\\\\\\\\n    console.log('Redis connection closed gracefully');\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport { App structure (&#96;src/index.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n- Fastify server with JWT auth\\\\n- Routes registered under &#96;/api/v1&#96;\\\\n- Health check endpoints\\\\n- Graceful shutdown handling\\\\n- Redis and BullMQ queue initialization\\\\n- Database connection management\\\\n\\\\n### 5. Configuration (&#96;src/config/index.ts&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n- Zod-validated config schema\\\\n- Environment variables loaded via dotenv\\\\n- Config includes:\\\\n  - Database (PostgreSQL)\\\\n  - Redis\\\\n  - JWT secrets\\\\n  - SMTP settings\\\\n  - LinkedIn integration\\\\n  - Feature flags\\\\n  - Rate limiting\\\\n\\\\n### 6. Worker scripts\\\\n\\\\nIn &#96;package.json&#96;:\\\\n- &#96;\\\\\\\"workers\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsx src/workers/index.ts\\\\\\\"&#96; - runs workers\\\\n- &#96;\\\\\\\"dev:workers\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"tsx watch src/workers/index.ts\\\\\\\"&#96; - runs workers in watch mode\\\\n\\\\n### 8. &#96;emailSyncService.ts&#96; content\\\\n\\\\n- IMAP-based email sync\\\\n- Fetches emails from configured accounts\\\\n- Parses emails with &#96;mailparser&#96;\\\\n- Multi-level conversation matching:\\\\n  1. In-Reply-To/References headers\\\\n  2. Deal-ID in subject\\\\n  3. Active deal matching\\\\n  4. Lead-level conversation matching\\\\n  5. Create new conversation for matching lead\\\\n- Deduplication by &#96;external_id&#96; (Message-ID)\\\\n- Updates sync status in &#96;email_accounts&#96; table\\\\n- Singleton pattern\\\\n\\\\n### 9. &#96;messageService.ts&#96; content\\\\n\\\\n- CRUD for messages (email, LinkedIn, internal notes, tasks)\\\\n- Sends emails via user SMTP or system SMTP\\\\n- LinkedIn message sending (with fallback)\\\\n- Redis Pub/Sub for real-time updates\\\\n- Typing indicators\\\\n- Message status tracking (draft, sending, sent, error)\\\\n- Pagination support\\\\n- Unread count tracking\\\\n- Singleton pattern\\\\n\\\\n### 10. Database schema (&#96;migrations/1771350000000_add_chat_system.sql&#96;)\\\\n\\\\nCreates 4 tables:\\\\n\\\\n1. &#96;conversations&#96;\\\\n   - Links to &#96;leads&#96; and &#96;deals&#96;\\\\n   - Types: &#96;direct&#96;, &#96;group&#96;, &#96;internal&#96;\\\\n   - Status: &#96;active&#96;, &#96;archived&#96;, &#96;closed&#96;\\\\n   - JSONB &#96;participant_emails&#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. &#96;messages&#96;\\\\n   - Links to &#96;conversations&#96; and &#96;team_members&#96; (sender)\\\\n   - Types: &#96;email&#96;, &#96;linkedin&#96;, &#96;internal_note&#96;, &#96;task&#96;\\\\n   - Direction: &#96;inbound&#96;, &#96;outbound&#96;, &#96;internal&#96;\\\\n   - Status: &#96;draft&#96;, &#96;sending&#96;, &#96;sent&#96;, &#96;error&#96;\\\\n   - JSONB fields: &#96;recipients&#96;, &#96;metadata&#96;, &#96;attachments&#96;\\\\n   - &#96;external_id&#96; (Message-ID) for deduplication\\\\n   - &#96;email_thread_id&#96; for threading\\\\n\\\\n3. &#96;email_accounts&#96;\\\\n   - IMAP/SMTP configuration per team member\\\\n   - Sync status tracking (&#96;idle&#96;, &#96;syncing&#96;, &#96;error&#96;)\\\\n   - Encrypted password storage\\\\n\\\\n4. &#96;linkedin_connections&#96;\\\\n   - OAuth tokens for LinkedIn integration\\\\n   - Profile data storage\\\\n\\\\nIndexes:\\\\n- B-tree indexes on foreign keys and common queries\\\\n- GIN indexes on JSONB fields (&#96;participant_emails&#96;, &#96;recipients&#96;, &#96;metadata&#96;, &#96;attachments&#96;)\\\\n- Unique index on &#96;messages.external_id&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### Additional findings\\\\n\\\\n- Redis configuration: &#96;src/config/redis.ts&#96; sets up ioredis with BullMQ-compatible options\\\\n- Queue configuration: &#96;src/config/queues.ts&#96; defines BullMQ queues (&#96;events&#96;, &#96;routing&#96;, &#96;sync&#96;, &#96;scheduled&#96;, &#96;notifications&#96;)\\\\n- Workers entry point: &#96;src/workers/index.ts&#96; initializes all workers including sync worker\\\\n- Sync worker: &#96;syncWorker.ts&#96; handles Moco and Slack integrations (not email sync)\\\\n\\\\n### Architecture notes\\\\n\\\\n- Email sync is service-based, not worker-based\\\\n- Workers use BullMQ for job processing\\\\n- Redis used for both BullMQ queues and Pub/Sub\\\\n- Email sync can be triggered manually or scheduled (no worker found yet)\\\\n- Message service handles both sending and receiving\\\\n- Conversation service provides access control and filtering\\\\n\\\\nThe codebase is set up for email synchronization, but there's no dedicated email sync worker yet. The &#96;emailSyncService&#96; exists and can be called, but it's not integrated into the worker
